full_text:
Lady Bu [Bu Lianshi] 步夫人[步練師]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Bu [Bu Lianshi] (步夫人[步練師])was born in Huaiyin in Linhuai. Lian Shi in Dynasty Warriors 7. Made Empress upon her death, was noted for not being jealous. Lady Bu [Bu Lianshi] was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Lady Bu [Bu Lianshi] lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
